headline: Phalhala or Bust: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Phalhala or Bust is projected #12 of 16 with a 554.90 projected-starting-lineup C-AVI total, led by Ashton Jeanty, Sam LaPorta, and Rome Odunze. The immediate priority is improving the QB slot without weakening that core.

projected_power.method: Sum of the eight verified projected starters' C-AVI values from all 16 AVI-Core team files

dynasty_power.method: Sum of every verified rostered player's D-AVI value from all 16 AVI-Core team files

latest_trade.summary: On May 3, Phalhala or Bust traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Michael Wilson, 2026 Round 2 (Ravens Regime), 2026 Round 4 (Badland Banditos) while sending Romeo Doubs. Michael Wilson is now the current WR starter at 62.6 C-AVI and 74.8 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

gap_closing_moves: Raise the QB slot above C.J. Stroud's 49.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 59.1 C-AVI would directly attack the 9.90-point projected gap to Gringo’s Goblins.
Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

latest_trade.summary: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.) while sending 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

rival_below.summary: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.) while sending 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Projected Power Position
sections.body: Projected #12 of 16 at 554.90 lineup C-AVI. Gringo’s Goblins is immediately above at 564.80, a gap of 9.90. Rapid Valley Annihilation is immediately behind at 545.30.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Ashton Jeanty (97.0), Sam LaPorta (86.2), and Rome Odunze (77.5).

sections.title: Latest Trade Impact
sections.body: On May 3, Phalhala or Bust traded with Ravens Regime and acquired Michael Wilson, 2026 Round 2 (Ravens Regime), 2026 Round 4 (Badland Banditos) while sending Romeo Doubs. Michael Wilson is now the current WR starter at 62.6 C-AVI and 74.8 D-AVI; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Moves to Close the Gap
sections.body: Raise the QB slot above C.J. Stroud's 49.2 C-AVI baseline; a replacement near 59.1 C-AVI would directly attack the 9.90-point projected gap to Gringo’s Goblins. Use draft capital as a targeted sweetener for a verified starting-lineup upgrade, not for additional bench depth.

sections.title: Rival Watch
sections.body: On July 8, Rapid Valley Annihilation traded with Corgi Loaf Baking Co. and acquired 2027 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.), 2028 Round 1 (Corgi Loaf Baking Co.) while sending 2026 Round 1 (Rapid Valley Annihilation). The deal sent out 1 draft asset, reducing future flexibility; The deal added 2 draft assets.

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: C.J. Stroud is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 49.2. Any acquisition should clear that exact lineup threshold.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 10 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
